1分快3三期必中大神的分享【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239281399_65587915<br>vk.com/topic-239251780_65856201<br>vk.com/topic-239218408_65310900<br>vk.com/topic-239251630_65856206<br>vk.com/topic-239251557_66238402<br>vk.com/topic-239183284_64798600<br>vk.com/topic-239191805_64713415<br>vk.com/topic-239286204_64798610<br>vk.com/topic-239183416_65119600<br>vk.com/topic-239183414_64798614<br>vk.com/topic-239183217_66238418<br>vk.com/topic-239218536_65119608<br>vk.com/topic-239280229_65587956<br>vk.com/topic-239183238_65310964<br>vk.com/topic-239272758_65310965<br>vk.com/topic-239251724_64798630<br>vk.com/topic-239251717_66238443<br>vk.com/topic-239183419_65587967<br>vk.com/topic-239297444_64798633<br>vk.com/topic-239297431_66463715<br>vk.com/topic-239251590_65856273<br>vk.com/topic-239183236_65119636<br>vk.com/topic-239182964_64798639<br>vk.com/topic-239251760_65856284<br>vk.com/topic-239284320_65856291<br>vk.com/topic-239183296_65119655<br>vk.com/topic-239183403_64967215<br>vk.com/topic-239218562_65410175<br>vk.com/topic-239183343_64967230<br>vk.com/topic-239251780_65856327<br>vk.com/topic-239218348_65311027<br>vk.com/topic-239251557_66238490<br>vk.com/topic-239241884_64798667<br>vk.com
